headline: BTQ Technologies Added to WisdomTree Quantum Computing Fund (WQTM), Expanding U.S. Thematic ETF Exposure
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ) (FSE: NG3), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, is pleased to announce that BTQ has been included in the WisdomTree Quantum Computing Fund (WQTM) (the "ETF"), a U.S.-listed thematic exchange traded fund designed to provide targeted exposure to companies driving innovation across the emerging quantum computing ecosystem.

headline: Options Traders Are Turning Bearish
summary: Options traders are betting that stocks have more room to fall. A measure called "skew" rose Monday morning to its highest level since November, Cboe Global Markets data showed. A higher skew typically signals that prices for put options are more expensive relative to call options.

content.title: Options Traders Are Turning Bearish
content.summary: Options traders are betting that stocks have more room to fall. A measure called "skew" rose Monday morning to its highest level since November, Cboe Global Markets data showed. A higher skew typically signals that prices for put options are more expensive relative to call options.
